And God, we thank you for the example of this man, his effort, his effectiveness. And God,
I pray you would help each of us this morning to be challenged. Not to be content with just
doing enough to get by, not to be content with just status quo. God, that we would
truly desire to be used of you, used of thee, in the same manner in which Onessa Forrest
was used of thee. Help us to put forth that effort, Lord, that we might be effective.
I pray that you'd move and work in hearts and lives as only you can, and we'll thank
you for it. In Christ's name we pray.
